name: spool-vscode
description: Requirements traceability navigation for Spool projects

spool.serverPath.description: Path to the spool binary. Leave empty to use the bundled binary.

scripts.package:linux-x64: bash build.sh linux amd64 && vsce package --target linux-x64
scripts.package:linux-arm64: bash build.sh linux arm64 && vsce package --target linux-arm64
scripts.package:darwin-x64: bash build.sh darwin amd64 && vsce package --target darwin-x64
scripts.package:darwin-arm64: bash build.sh darwin arm64 && vsce package --target darwin-arm64
scripts.package:win32-x64: bash build.sh windows amd64 && vsce package --target win32-x64
scripts.package:all: npm run package:linux-x64 && npm run package:linux-arm64 && npm run package:darwin-x64 && npm run package:darwin-arm64 && npm run package:win32-x64
